name: Path
summary: A path entity represents a continuous, multi-segment polyline or bezier curve.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Path between a start point and an end point, or from a provided Rectangle or Ellipse.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Path between a start point and an end point, or from a provided Rectangle or Ellipse.

throws.when: if the length between start point and end point is zero

methods.name: new_arc
methods.summary: The new_arc method creates a new arc-shaped Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The new_arc method creates a new arc-shaped Layout::Path.

throws.when: if radius is less than or equal to zero
if start angle is equal to end angle

methods.name: append_point
methods.signature: append_point(point) => Layout::Path | append_point(control_point1, control_point2, point) => Layout::Path
methods.summary: The #append_point method appends a Geom::Point2d to the end of the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #append_point method appends a Geom::Point2d to the end of the Layout::Path.

throws.when: if the Layout::Path is on a locked Layer

methods.name: arc
methods.summary: The #arc method returns the parameters of an arc from the Layout::Path, or nil if path is not an arc.
methods.remarks: The #arc method returns the parameters of an arc from the Layout::Path, or nil if path is not an arc.

returns.doc: The center point, radius, start angle, and end angle

methods.name: circle
methods.summary: The #circle method returns the parameters of a circle from the Layout::Path, or nil if path is not a circle.
methods.remarks: The #circle method returns the parameters of a circle from the Layout::Path, or nil if path is not a circle.

returns.doc: The center point and the radius

throws.when: if the Layout::Path is on a locked Layer
if the Layout::Path can not be closed becauase it contains less than three points.

methods.name: closed?
methods.summary: The #closed? method returns whether the Layout::Path is closed.
methods.remarks: The #closed? method returns whether the Layout::Path is closed.

methods.name: end_arrow
methods.summary: The #end_arrow method creates a new Layout::Path from an end arrow.
methods.remarks: The #end_arrow method creates a new Layout::Path from an end arrow.

methods.name: end_point
methods.summary: The #end_point method returns the end point of the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #end_point method returns the end point of the Layout::Path.

methods.name: parametric_length
methods.summary: The #parametric_length method returns the parametric length for the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #parametric_length method returns the parametric length for the Layout::Path. The parametric length is the length with respect to the curve of the Layout::Path.

methods.name: point_at
methods.summary: The #point_at method returns the Geom::Point2d at a given parametric value.
methods.remarks: The #point_at method returns the Geom::Point2d at a given parametric value.

throws.when: if the parametric value is less than zero or greater than the Layout::Path's parametric length

methods.name: point_types
methods.summary: The #point_types method returns an array of point types corresponding to the Geom::Point2ds in the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #point_types method returns an array of point types corresponding to the Geom::Point2ds in the Layout::Path. A point type can be one of the following values: POINT_TYPE_MOVE_TO POINT_TYPE_LINE_TO POINT_TYPE_BEZIER_TO POINT_TYPE_ARC_CENTER POINT_TYPE_BEZIER_CONTROL POINT_TYPE_CLOSE

returns.doc: An array of integers that correspond with point types.

methods.name: points
methods.summary: The #points method returns an array of Geom::Point2ds in the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #points method returns an array of Geom::Point2ds in the Layout::Path.

methods.name: start_arrow
methods.summary: The #start_arrow method creates a new Layout::Path from a start arrow.
methods.remarks: The #start_arrow method creates a new Layout::Path from a start arrow.

methods.name: start_point
methods.summary: The #start_point method returns the start point of the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #start_point method returns the start point of the Layout::Path.

methods.name: tangent_at
methods.summary: The #tangent_at method returns the tangent Geom::Vector2d at the given parametric value.
methods.remarks: The #tangent_at method returns the tangent Geom::Vector2d at the given parametric value.

throws.when: if the parametric value is less than zero or greater than the Layout::Path's parametric length

methods.name: winding
methods.summary: The #winding method returns the winding type of the Layout::Path.
methods.remarks: The #winding method returns the winding type of the Layout::Path. A point type can be one of the following values: PATH_WINDING_NONE PATH_WINDING_CLOCKWISE PATH_WINDING_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
